assumptions.modeled_load_without_plan: starts from current CTL as daily load proxy and changes by weekly_ramp_pct each week
assumptions.planned_load_override_behavior: planned_daily_loads replace modeled load on matching dates only

boundaries: projection is deterministic scenario modeling, not a physiological prediction
requires a start_date with non-null current CTL, ATL, and TSB from get_fitness
does not read hidden upstream periodization or future calendar fields
only the deterministic_ctl_atl_tsb model is supported
